wmcadsContentCardProps.name: id
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: The id of the content card

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: link
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Specifies the link to display the content card component as a clickable navigation card.

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: linkTitle
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Specifies the title of the link to display the content card component as a clickable navigation card.

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: classes
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Classes to add to the content card component.

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: yellow
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card with a highlighted (yellow) background. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: isBanner
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card as a banner. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: isNews
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card as a news card. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: isCta
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card as a call to action card. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: isEvent
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card as an event card. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: isSrcDefault
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Displays the content card with default source styling. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: clickable
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Makes the content card clickable. Default value is false

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: variant
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: Additional variant class for the content card.

wmcadsContentCardProps.name: contentHTML
wmcadsContentCardProps.description: HTML to use within the content card.
